hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented in a JAX-based library and trained on the curated SPICE2 dataset using the stated protocol—while augmenting MACE with gating and species-dependent edge features—then they will match the accuracy of standard implementations yet achieve faster inference and end-to-end molecular dynamics simulations on H100 GPUs than Torch+ASE baselines because XLA compilation and the architectural modifications reduce computational overhead without sacrificing model fidelity.
